title: vnd.proton.eval (ProtonMail)
description: Implement ProtonMail eval extension. Adds :eval modifier to the variables set action, enabling arithmetic expressions. Syntax: set :eval "varname" "expression" where expression supports +, -, *, / on numeric variables. Example: set :eval "result" "${size} * 25 - 1". Documented at proton.me/support/sieve-advanced-custom-filters. No RFC; proprietary to ProtonMail.
